EduMetric

PDP University Grant Reyting

Kirish

Grant Reytingi

Talabalarning grant ball reytingi - shaffof baholash tizimi

Jami: 0 talaba
Yuklanmoqda...

Ball tizimi

Akademik natija40 ball
Davomat20 ball
Topshiriqlar15 ball
Faollik10 ball
Tyutor bahosi5 ball
Intizom10 ball
Jami100 ball

Bonus va Jarima

Jarima (max)-20 ball
Tiklanish (max)+10 ball
Bandlik bonusi+10 ball

Grant shartlari

Minimal o'tish balli: 80 ball

GPA minimal: 80%

Grant qoplaydi: o'qish, yotoqxona, ovqat
